series_metadata.series_title: Golden Buckeye Card Records – including Ohio BMV Records
series_metadata.series_description: Golden Buckeye Card Records, including individual Ohio BMV Records; to assist with the automated issuance of Golden Buckeye cards.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from date of receiving Ohio BMV Record(s). BMV Registrar needs be notified of destruction of any Ohio BMV records. Contacts BMV Register can be found at https://publicsafety.ohio.gov/local-office or by calling 614-443-5100. ; Paper: from date of receiving Ohio BMV Record(s). BMV Registrar needs be notified of destruction of any Ohio BMV records. Contacts BMV Register can be found at https://publicsafety.ohio.gov/local-office or by calling 614-443-5100
